creator: goksin@goksinakdeniz.net
text:
(In reply to cmt from comment #4)
> liferea-1.10.8_1 "works for me", I even recompiled it just to make sure I
> have the current version, but I'm not able to reproduce the problem.
> It has been assumed that the crash is related to the tray icon, but I don't
> have a tray, so perhaps that's why it's working for me? (What windowmanager
> besides metacity does provide a tray? I only have FvwmButtons, and I'm quite
> happy with that.)
> Has anyone tried to use liferea without tray icon? The setting should be
> reachable as gconf key "/apps/liferea/trayicon".

Disbaling tray icon does not solve the problem. Neither i386 nor amd64, with 8.4, 9.2 and 10.0 installations are able to run it. The same error message repeated on all. 

"Assertion failed: (! _cairo_surface_has_mime_data (surface)), function cairo_surface_mark_dirty_rectangle, file cairo-surface.c, line 1174.
Abort trap: 6 (core dumped.)"
